displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #67: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part VI
synopsis: "THE SCOURGING OF SHU-TORUN" PART 6!  The fate of an entire world is in the hands of the REBELS! And even then, can anyone manage to escape the Scourging of SHU-TORUN? The cataclysmic end of KIERON GILLEN's run on STAR WARS.
title: Star Wars (2015) #67: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part VI
